news.title: Trump proposes 20% toll on cargo through Strait of Hormuz; restarts Iran blockade
news.summary: The Strait of Hormuz is a major oil-shipping route and the epicenter of the U.S. and Israel's ongoing war with Iran.

news.title: Trump recommends Lindsey Graham's sister serve as interim senator for South Carolina
news.summary: The death of Sen. Lindsey Graham ignited a scramble among South Carolina Republicans to prepare for a special primary election to replace him on the GOP ticket.

news.title: SpaceX stock sinks for a second-straight day, nearing $135 IPO price
news.summary: Elon Musk's space and AI company was added to the Nasdaq-100 last week. SpaceX went public a month ago in a record IPO.

news.title: Trump calls for Congress to pass Clarity Act crypto bill to honor Lindsey Graham
news.summary: The Senate Banking Committee approved the bill 15-9 in May. Two Democrats joined Republicans to advance the legislation. The bill is expected to be voted on by the full Senate later this year.

news.title: Paramount-WBD merger expected to face lawsuit from multiple states, sources say
news.summary: Multiple state attorneys general are expected to file a lawsuit challenging the merger between Paramount Skydance and Warner Bros. Discovery. The merger is expected to close in the next few months.

news.title: Micron and other chip stocks feel the pain of imported volatility — blame SK Hynix
news.summary: SK Hynix’s stock had its worst day in 18 years in South Korea trading. The SOX chip index was suffering a unanimous selloff.

news.title: Can big banks’ ‘cheap’ stocks keep rising? We’ll find out when JPMorgan and an unusual number of others report earnings Tuesday
news.summary: Among the largest U.S. banks, Citigroup is expected to show the greatest improvement. But it still has a long way to go to reach its own performance target.

news.title: Global oil prices top $80 a barrel after Trump reimposes Strait of Hormuz blockade and charges 20% fee for cargo shipped through
news.summary: The week is kicking off with fresh spikes for oil prices after President Donald Trump reimposed the naval blockage on the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
news.summary: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits,” he says.

news.title: My wife’s 2011 Ford Fiesta was totaled. Should we accept a $2,000 insurance settlement or give up the car for $2,700?
news.summary: "The hood is bent, the radiator is cracked, and the front bumper is destroyed," he says. "The front bumper has been destroyed.” "The car is a wreck," he adds. "It's a mess"
